Admission Process & Fee Details for 1°' Year B. E.: 2023-2024
Step 1: Obtain allotment order from KEA. Then report at Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE),
Building No.02, Main Library, DS! Campus Bangalore-111, Verification of admission order issued by respective
authorities and original documents.
Step 2: Students has to report in Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering (DSCE), Building No.02, Main Library,
DSI Campus Bangalore-111 .Wait for your turn to complete the admission process (online entry).
Step 3: Fees can be paid through Debit Card or UPI or NEFT / RTGS
Once fee paid, the candidate will be allowed for the entry of the application form.
All original documents should be scanned (Color) in PDF format within 1MB and to be kept ready in mobile or
pen drive — to be uploaded in student login. (Avoid scanning in mobile or taking photos in mobile and
uploading it) & Passport Size photo (soft copy within 500 KB)
After successful entry of the application form, take a print out of the application, then the candidate &
parents have to affix the signature and submit all the necessary documents as given below to the admission
Finally, obtain the acknowledgement for submitted documents from the admission authorities
